name: isml-a11y
description: Accessibility scanner for ISML files (Salesforce B2C Commerce markup language)

scripts.test: node --test tests/rules/img-alt.test.js tests/rules/button-type.test.js tests/rules/input-label.test.js tests/rules/empty-links.test.js tests/scanner.test.js tests/reporters/json-reporter.test.js tests/reporters/html-reporter.test.js tests/integration.test.js
